properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I find myself alone again, My hopes and dreams caving in, I find myself alone again, Wondering when this will end, But then a voice calls out to me, Surrender all so you can be.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: (You're, I'm) Beautifully broken, (You're, I'm) Perfectly scarred, Your love overwhelms me, I am never too far, With grace like a river, It washes me clean, Bringing to life what was lost inside of me, Beautifully broken, Beautifully broken.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I find myself with You again, Take control I'm giving in, I find myself with you again, Where broken things are mended, I hear your voice call out to me, I'm making you a masterpiece.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You make all things new, You make all things new, I am whole in You (I'm made, I'm restored) I am whole in You (I'm made, I'm restored).
